rationale: Mizik (2014) is cited in the hypothesis development and again in Study 3 variable justification, not only as a one-off background mention. The citing paper uses it as prior evidence that customer-based brand equity (including BAV-based evaluations) predicts brands' financial valuation/performance. Although the citing paper does not reuse Mizik's time-series stock-market method, Mizik's findings support a core logical link in the citing paper's model from consumer evaluations to financial outcomes.
relation_description: The citing paper draws on Mizik (2014) as empirical grounding that customer mindset brand equity is financially consequential. This foundation is used to motivate and justify the paper's mediation claim that logo design effects on financial-based brand equity operate through consumer brand evaluations.
